name: Re-asking guest name after it was already given
expected_behavior: Sarah's name captured in turn 1 and used naturally in later turns without re-asking. By turn 3, 'Sarah' should appear in the response as a natural address. Agent never asks 'What's your name?' or 'And who am I speaking with?'
expected_behavioral_quality: Guest introduces themselves in turn 1. Agent must NOT ask for name in any subsequent turn. Name should appear naturally in later responses (sign-offs, confirmations) without being re-asked.

turns.user_message: Hi, I'm Sarah. What restaurants do you have?
turns.agent_response:
It's a pleasure to meet you, Sarah. We have a collection of spots that range from 24-hour diners to upscale Italian, but for this time of day, Hash House A Go Go in the Casino of the Earth is a must-visit for its famous "twisted farm food." 

The aroma of griddled bacon and fresh sage hits you before you even see the plates, and their portions are truly massive—the sage fried chicken and waffles is a guest favorite that usually requires a serious appetite. They are open until 2:00 PM today, so it is the perfect window to experience their unique take on comfort food in a casual setting. If you are looking for something later in the day, Ballo Italian Restaurant opens at 5:00 PM and offers a beautiful, modern atmosphere with incredible housemade pastas.

After a meal that satisfying, a stroll toward the Wolf Den for some free live music is a great way to keep the energy going. Are you in the mood for a big, hearty meal like that, or were you looking for something lighter for lunch?

We have two distinct spas depending on the atmosphere you prefer. Mandara Spa is an award-winning retreat inspired by Balinese healing traditions; it features a tranquil relaxation lounge, steam room, and sauna that stay open until 8:00 PM.

If you're looking for something more modern, the Elemis Spa in the Earth Tower focuses on premium skincare and couples' experiences until 7:00 PM. After a day on the floor, a treatment there is the perfect reset. I can help you decide between a signature body wrap at Mandara or an express service at Elemis, and then I can connect you with our host team to finalize the booking.

Once you're feeling refreshed, the Wolf Den has an intimate energy where you're right there with the performer—it's electric! Are you looking for a full day of pampering, or just a quick express treatment to get back to the action?

turns.user_message: Can you recommend something fun tonight?
turns.agent_response:
Sarah, for tonight, I'd suggest checking out Comix Roadhouse since their comedy shows run every Thursday through Sunday. It is a great venue for catching nationally touring comedians, and they have a full menu if you want to enjoy dinner during the set. 

If you would prefer a more sophisticated atmosphere, novelle is open tonight as well; it is an ultra-lounge with craft cocktails and a DJ that sets a smooth mood for the evening. You might also enjoy the Wolf Den, which has a free live performance at 8:00 PM and offers a very intimate connection with the artists.

Before the show starts, you could stop by Ballo Italian Restaurant for some housemade pasta to fuel up for the night—it is the perfect pre-show meal! While schedules and prices may change, I can help you with more details on any of these venues if you need them. Would you prefer a night centered around live music or are you looking for some laughs at the comedy club?
